violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean ice catcher inside big ice machine.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. -1 of the unisex bathrooms needs a covered waste basket.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
